blockquote.p: Note to Balloters: The one structural change to MessageDefinition in this ballot widens the type of MessageDefinition.focus.code from code to uri so a message focus can reference logical models and canonical resource identifiers. Separately, the MessageDefinition.jurisdiction elements were undeprecated while retaining an explanatory note.

ul.li: Type of MessageDefinition.focus.code changed from code to uri, allowing the message focus to reference logical models and canonical resource identifiers [FHIR-51651]
The MessageDefinition.jurisdiction elements are no longer marked deprecated [FHIR-53766]

div.p: Implementers should be familiar with the messaging concepts and descriptions found in Messaging using FHIR Resources before working with this resource.
